hero.tagline: Backend-focused software engineer building high-performance financial systems. Passionate about scalable architecture, data pipelines, and clean APIs.

paragraphs: I'm a software engineer at Goldman Sachs in Asset & Wealth Management, where I own and scale backend compute pipelines, APIs, and data infrastructure for financial analytics.

From parallelising batch jobs and cutting runtimes by 20 minutes, to leading a SingleStore Cloud POC achieving 50% query performance improvement — I care deeply about the craft of building things that work at scale.
B.Tech in Computer Science from ABES Engineering College, Ghaziabad. Based in India.

bullets: Leading a SingleStore Cloud POC, optimising analytical queries and achieving 50% improvement in query performance for TWR, IRR, volatility, and regulatory workloads.
Owned and scaled TWR Batch Compute and API backend pipelines, ensuring reliable daily batch execution and SLA compliance during periods of team attrition.
Reduced TWR Batch Compute runtime by 20 minutes per run (avg. 5 hrs) by parallelising feed ingestion and copy operations, enabling additional intra-day compute cycles.
Designed concurrent feed processing using Java multithreading, improving throughput and stability.
Built and productionised a backend API for Forwards Notionals calculation, supporting migration from legacy systems.
Automated manual ingestion workflows using CI pipelines and Python, reducing operational overhead and minimising human error.
Implemented entitlement and access-control checks in regulatory dashboards to ensure compliance with risk management requirements.
Collaborated closely with Product, Ops, and DB teams to troubleshoot data-quality issues and deliver end-to-end backend solutions.
Enhanced and shipped new features to the self-service UI dashboard built on Angular.
Resolved student queries on C++ and organised live DSA practice sessions.
Built a responsive e-commerce website using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

projects.name: Personal Expense Manager App
projects.desc: Mobile app to store and track personal daily expenses. Clean cross-platform experience built with Flutter and Dart.

projects.name: Portfolio Website
projects.desc: This site — dark cinematic portfolio with live GitHub repo integration, scroll animations, and custom cursor effects.

projects.name: E-commerce Website
projects.desc: Responsive e-commerce site built during internship at Grow90, focusing on UX and mobile-first design principles.
